text.title: Strategy Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team share strategy vocabulary?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Run primer; produce glossary + decision tree.

example.trace: shared=false → produce glossary with 5 canonical terms + decision tree primer.
